title.en: But harvest represents danger, bad luck, and be...

content.en:
The Golden True Sea is indeed too dangerous, and it is indeed easy to be killed if it is not strong.

However, there are really so many resources out there, and there are amazing gains at will.

But harvest represents danger, bad luck, and being killed is also bad luck.

......

Golden real sea.

Ye Tian was still looking for treasures here, and the Golden True Sea had already been targeted by some incomparably powerful Nine Realm peak powerhouses.

this day.

A white giant ape stepped into the Golden True Sea, and many strong people recognized him.

"It's the Ancient Ape True Monarch of the Holy Ape Mountain, and he is actually here!"

"It is said that the Ancient Ape True Monarch has already comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five Supreme Rules, and he is only one step away from comprehending the Ultimate Rules. He has also mastered the Eight Ultimate Dimensional Killing Moves, so hurry up and run away, you can't get close to him!"

"The strength of the Ancient Ape True Monarch is terrifying, and his temperament is not good, if you offend him, then you will die!"

A group of strong people have stayed away from the ancient ape true monarch.

And not long after, powerhouses comparable to the Ancient Ape True Monarch descended one by one, and there were even Nine Realms Peak existence that was even more powerful than the Ancient Ape True Monarch.

There are also several such existences in the multidimensional territory, but they have not stayed in the multidimensional territory, and have been wandering in the sea of dimensions, and now they have also rushed 02 over.

For example, the most powerful Nine Realms peak existence in the Void Heaven Palace, the True Wu Realm Lord!

Of course.

Ye Tian has nothing to do with the True Wu Realm Lord, he has not seen him, and no one will come to help him.

Therefore, in the Golden True Sea, everything can only be relied on by yourself.

Soon after.

Ye Tian encountered an existence at the peak of the Nine Realms, even if he went all out, he could only choose to escape.

"There are more and more strong people who have entered the Golden True Sea, and those who dare to stay here are some top powerhouses, no less than me. "

Ye Tian knew that his advantage was not strength, but copying his body, and if he fell, he would fall, and he could copy another one.

That's his strength.

Subsequently, he continued to go deep into the depths of the Golden True Sea, and gradually discovered the ultimate creatures native to the Golden True Sea.

These ultimate creatures are also extremely powerful, even he has to avoid their edges, and he really can't break through the opponent's defenses.

However, there are also more resources in the depths of the Golden True Sea.

this day.

A terrifying battle broke out in the depths of the Golden True Sea, and the fluctuations seemed to sweep through the entire Golden True Sea, and many strong people rushed over one after another.

......

The depths of the golden true sea.

Ancient Ape True Monarch, True Wu Realm Lord and other powerhouses have all come here and are besieging a giant snake-like ultimate creature.

The strength of this ultimate creature was extremely terrifying, and it was not weak at all to shake so many top Nine Realms peak existences with its own strength.

Ye Tianze also came, but the distance was very far, and he spied on the situation here with his ultimate will, and when he saw so many powerful Nine Realm peaks, he didn't dare to approach, otherwise the aftermath alone would kill him.

Soon.

Ye Tian understood why these powerhouses at the peak of the Nine Realms wanted to be killed, it turned out that it was because of that stone stele.

The ultimate creature is also guarding the stele.

Ye Tian was far away, although he couldn't see the value of this stele, but those strong people wanted to snatch it.

It's just that the ultimate creature is too powerful for them to get close.

Just as they were slaughtering and fighting, another Ultimate creature arrived, belonging to the same race as this Ultimate Creature, and its strength was almost the same.

Bang!!!!

The two ultimate creatures joined forces, and these powerhouses were injured one after another, and they withdrew one by one, not daring to stay here any longer.

And those weaker Nine Realms peak powerhouses naturally didn't dare to approach.

......

Soon, the news about the stele came out, and Ye Tian finally knew what the stele was.

The ultimate ancient monument!

Participating in the Ultimate Ancient Monument is to hope to comprehend the ultimate rules, which is why the Ancient Ape True Monarch is so desperate.

It's a pity that the two ultimate creatures guarding the Ultimate Ancient Monument are too powerful, and they have mastered the rules of the Ultimate, coupled with the powerful Ultimate Blood and Ultimate Body, these strong people naturally can't shake them.

"Ultimate Ancient Monument, good thing, if I obtain it, I can quickly ascend to the Supreme Dimensional Rules, and even comprehend the Ultimate Rules!"

Ye Tian also wanted to get it, but it was a pity that so many strong people couldn't join forces, and his strength was naturally even less qualified.

But he also knew very well that there would be more strong people coming, and those two ultimate creatures would definitely not be able to bear it at that time.

However, something unexpected happened to many strong people.

this day.

A strong man peeked into the Extreme Ancient Monument, but found that the Ultimate Ancient Monument was gone, and the two Ultimate Creatures also ran away.

The Ultimate Ancient Monument can be moved, so the two Ultimate Creatures are not stupid, and they directly escape with the Ultimate Ancient Monument.

As a result, many strong people were looking for those two ultimate creatures, but they couldn't find them.

Obviously, these two ultimate creatures have extraordinary concealment methods, and they may have escaped from the Golden True Sea, but that's not for sure.

Time passes.

Ye Tian continued to look for resources in the Golden True Sea.

this day.

He felt a pull that seemed to draw him over.

"This attraction is none other than ......"

Ye Tian was very excited.

This is obviously a treasure that can improve his replication talent, if he obtains this treasure, his replication talent 307 can be upgraded to the ultimate talent, and he can copy other ultimate talents.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled along the attraction.

It wasn't long before he came to an island where the treasure he needed was located.

However, as soon as he approached the island, a terrifying beast appeared, and it was also the ultimate creature.

Fortunately, the strength of this ultimate creature is not too exaggerated, it is stronger than Ye Tian, but it is not strong enough to kill him in seconds.

Thundered!!!!

After a fight, Ye Tian was easily hit hard.

Immediately, he retreated.

After that, he condensed the replica bodies one by one and came together to besiege this ultimate creature.

"Strange Domain!"

"Strange Domain!"

"Strange Domain!"

Ye Tian used this ultimate dimensional killing move to constantly suppress this ultimate creature, and multiple replicating bodies attacked together.

At this time, another copy body infiltrated the island in search of the treasure that would enhance his copying talent.

Interior of the island.

Ye Tian easily locked on to that treasure, it was a vine, which seemed to have absorbed the blood of a large number of ultimate creatures, resulting in a special mutation.

It's unclear what other functions this vine has, but now there's only one function, and that's to increase his copying talent.
